runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "PHP", "build_system": "composer", "package_manager": "composer", "build_commands": ["composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist"], "install_commands": ["apk add --no-cache git unzip bash"], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "8.4", "system_packages": ["libzip-dev", "zip"]}, "repo_type": "library", "base_image": "php:8.4-fpm-alpine3.23", "base_image_rationale": "Lightweight PHP 8.4 runtime with PHP-FPM on Alpine, suitable for building and testing a PHP library with Composer.", "pitfalls": ["PHP unit tests rely on composer-dev dependencies; ensure dev dependencies are installed for full test suite.", "Project targets PHP 7.1+ and ~8; using PHP 8.4 may surface compatibility issues in tests or coding standards."], "notes": "Autoload uses a large set of files via PSR-4 and a long list of files defined in composer.json; tests are run via vendor/bin/phpunit as defined in the project scripts."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
FROM php:8.4-fpm-alpine3.23 AS builder

# Build dependencies
RUN apk add --no-cache git unzip bash libzip-dev zip curl

# Enable zip extension for build
RUN docker-php-ext-install zip

# Install Composer (for building dependencies)
ENV COMPOSER_ALLOW_SUPERUSER=1
RUN curl -sS https://getcomposer.org/installer | php -- --install-dir=/usr/local/bin --filename=composer

WORKDIR /app

# Copy only composer files first to leverage Docker cache
COPY composer.json ./
RUN composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist

# Copy the rest of the source and install dev dependencies as well
COPY . .
RUN composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist

# Runtime image
FROM php:8.4-fpm-alpine3.23

# Runtime dependencies
RUN apk add --no-cache git unzip bash libzip-dev zip curl

# Enable zip extension
RUN docker-php-ext-install zip

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built app from builder
COPY --from=builder /app /app
COPY --from=builder /usr/local/bin/composer /usr/local/bin/composer

EXPOSE 9000

# Default to PHP-FPM
CMD ["php-fpm"]

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM php:8.4-fpm-alpine3.23

# Install system dependencies (git, unzip, bash, libzip, curl for composer)
RUN apk add --no-cache git unzip bash libzip-dev zip curl

# Enable PHP zip extension
RUN docker-php-ext-install zip

# Install Composer
ENV COMPOSER_ALLOW_SUPERUSER=1
RUN curl -sS https://getcomposer.org/installer | php -- --install-dir=/usr/local/bin --filename=composer

WORKDIR /app

# First install production dependencies to leverage build cache
COPY composer.json ./
RUN composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist

# Copy the rest of the source
COPY . .

# Install dev dependencies for full test suite
RUN composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist

# By default run unit tests if container starts
CMD ["vendor/bin/phpunit"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Build stage (optional, but keeps runtime image slim)
FROM php:8.4-fpm-bullseye AS build

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git unzip bash zip \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Enable PHP zip extension
RUN docker-php-ext-install zip

# Install Composer
ENV COMPOSER_ALLOW_SUPERUSER=1
RUN curl -sS https://getcomposer.org/installer | php -- --install-dir=/usr/local/bin --filename=composer

WORKDIR /app

# Copy only composer.json first to leverage build cache
COPY composer.json ./
RUN composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist

# Copy the rest of the application code
COPY . .

# Install all dependencies (including dev) for full test suite
RUN composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist

# Runtime image
FROM php:8.4-fpm-bullseye

# Install system dependencies for runtime
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends git unzip bash zip \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Enable PHP zip extension
RUN docker-php-ext-install zip

# Copy Composer binary from build stage and vendor code
COPY --from=build /usr/local/bin/composer /usr/local/bin/composer
COPY --from=build /app /app

WORKDIR /app

# Default command: run PHPUnit tests to verify the build
CMD ["vendor/bin/phpunit"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM php:8.4-fpm-alpine3.23

# Install system dependencies for PHP and Composer
RUN apk add --no-cache git unzip bash libzip-dev zip curl

# Enable PHP zip extension
RUN docker-php-ext-install zip

# Install Composer
ENV COMPOSER_ALLOW_SUPERUSER=1
RUN curl -sS https://getcomposer.org/installer | php -- --install-dir=/usr/local/bin --filename=composer

WORKDIR /app

# Copy composer.json first to leverage build cache
COPY composer.json ./
RUN composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist

# Copy the rest of the application code
COPY . .

# Install dependencies (including dev) for full test suite
RUN composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist

# Default command: run PHPUnit tests
CMD ["vendor/bin/phpunit"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM php:8.4-fpm-alpine3.23 AS builder

# Build dependencies
RUN apk add --no-cache git unzip bash libzip-dev zip curl

# Enable zip extension for build
RUN docker-php-ext-install zip

# Install Composer (for building dependencies)
ENV COMPOSER_ALLOW_SUPERUSER=1
RUN curl -sS https://getcomposer.org/installer | php -- --install-dir=/usr/local/bin --filename=composer

WORKDIR /app

# Copy only composer files first to leverage Docker cache
COPY composer.json composer.lock ./
RUN composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist

# Copy the rest of the source and install dev dependencies as well
COPY . .
RUN composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist

# Runtime image
FROM php:8.4-fpm-alpine3.23

# Runtime dependencies
RUN apk add --no-cache git unzip bash libzip-dev zip curl

# Enable zip extension
RUN docker-php-ext-install zip

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built app from builder
COPY --from=builder /app /app
COPY --from=builder /usr/local/bin/composer /usr/local/bin/composer

EXPOSE 9000

# Default to PHP-FPM
CMD ["php-fpm"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM php:8.4-fpm-alpine3.23 AS builder

# Build dependencies
RUN apk add --no-cache git unzip bash libzip-dev zip curl

# Enable zip extension for build
RUN docker-php-ext-install zip

# Install Composer (for building dependencies)
ENV COMPOSER_ALLOW_SUPERUSER=1
RUN curl -sS https://getcomposer.org/installer | php -- --install-dir=/usr/local/bin --filename=composer

WORKDIR /app

# Copy only composer files first to leverage Docker cache
COPY composer.json ./
RUN composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist

# Copy the rest of the source and install dev dependencies as well
COPY . .
RUN composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist

# Runtime image
FROM php:8.4-fpm-alpine3.23

# Runtime dependencies
RUN apk add --no-cache git unzip bash libzip-dev zip curl

# Enable zip extension
RUN docker-php-ext-install zip

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built app from builder
COPY --from=builder /app /app
COPY --from=builder /usr/local/bin/composer /usr/local/bin/composer

EXPOSE 9000

# Default to PHP-FPM
CMD ["php-fpm"]
"}

artifacts.content:
FROM php:8.4-fpm-alpine3.23 AS builder

# Build dependencies
RUN apk add --no-cache git unzip bash libzip-dev zip curl

# Enable zip extension for build
RUN docker-php-ext-install zip

# Install Composer (for building dependencies)
ENV COMPOSER_ALLOW_SUPERUSER=1
RUN curl -sS https://getcomposer.org/installer | php -- --install-dir=/usr/local/bin --filename=composer

WORKDIR /app

# Copy only composer files first to leverage Docker cache
COPY composer.json ./
RUN composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist

# Copy the rest of the source and install dev dependencies as well
COPY . .
RUN composer install --no-interaction --prefer-dist

# Runtime image
FROM php:8.4-fpm-alpine3.23

# Runtime dependencies
RUN apk add --no-cache git unzip bash libzip-dev zip curl

# Enable zip extension
RUN docker-php-ext-install zip

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built app from builder
COPY --from=builder /app /app
COPY --from=builder /usr/local/bin/composer /usr/local/bin/composer

EXPOSE 9000

# Default to PHP-FPM
CMD ["php-fpm"]
